steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ='04.423.567/0001-21' AND (ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE BETWEEN '2024-12-01' AND '2024-12-31' OR ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE BETWEEN '2024-09-01' AND '2024-09-30') ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE DESC, ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ='04.423.567/0001-21' AND REPORT_DATE BETWEEN '2024-12-01' AND '2024-12-31' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 1;"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.output:
{'status': 'success', 'report': '| REPORT_DATE | ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED | ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY | PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED | PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY | TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED | TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2024-12-31 | 1932592000 | 1202000 | 0 | 0 | 1932592000 | 1202000 |
'}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva Dec 2024
# Given values from CVM query
shares_issued = 1932592000
shares_treasury = 1202000
shares_outstanding = shares_issued - shares_treasury
price = 12.47

# Balance/Income values (BRL)
ativo_total = 52770780000.0
ativo_circulante = 8518296000.0
caixa = 3194255000.0
aplicacoes_financeiras = 672057000.0

passivo_circulante = 5783912000.0
fornecedores = 1660039000.0

# Empréstimos e Financiamentos
empr_fin_curr = 1369143000.0
empr_fin_noncurr = 16017296000.0

# Divida Bruta = sum of empr and financ
div_bruta = empr_fin_curr + empr_fin_noncurr

# Disponibilidades = caixa + aplicacoes
disponibilidades = caixa + aplicacoes_financeiras

# Patrimonio liquido - parent
patrimonio_total = 20214767000.0
participacao_nao_controladores = 1305279000.0
patrimonio_liq_parent = patrimonio_total - participacao_nao_controladores

# Receita, EBIT, Lucro Liquido (12 months)
receita_12 = 11387505000.0
ebit_12 = 2211909000.0
lucro_liq_12 = 549472000.0
lucro_atribuivel_controladora = 42013000.0

# Previous quarter (Sep 2024) cumulative values
receita_prev = 6528950000.0
ebit_prev = 753670000.0
lucro_prev = 1499056000.0

# Resultado Bruto for margin
resultado_bruto = 3953483000.0
# Depreciação (7.04 is negative in DB)
dep_amort = 1689626000.0

# Calculations
shares = shares_outstanding
market_cap = price * shares

div_liq = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# 3-month (quarterly) values = difference
receita_3m = receita_12 - receita_prev
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_prev
lucro_3m = lucro_liq_12 - lucro_prev

# per-share metrics
ebit_per_share = ebit_12 / shares
revenue_per_share = receita_12 / shares
lpa = lucro_atribuivel_controladora / shares
vpa = patrimonio_liq_parent / shares

# Multiples
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share if revenue_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativos = price / (ativo_total / shares)

# Capital de giro
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
p_cap_giro = price / (cap_giro / shares) if (cap_giro != 0) else None

# Ativo circulante líquido (assumed current assets - inventories)
estoques = 813508000.0
ativo_circ_liq = ativo_circulante - estoques
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / (ativo_circ_liq / shares) if ativo_circ_liq != 0 else None

# EBITDA
ebitda = ebit_12 + dep_amort

# Enterprise Value EV = market cap + debt - cash - financial investments
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12

# margins
marg_bruta = resultado_bruto / receita_12
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / receita_12
marg_liquida = lucro_liq_12 / receita_12

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_12 / ativo_total

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = ebit_12 / roic_denom

# ROE = lucro líquido atribuível / patrimônio líquido (parent)
roe = lucro_atribuivel_controladora / patrimonio_liq_parent

# Liquidez corrente
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq_parent

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = receita_12 / ativo_total

# Prepare results
results = {
    'shares_outstanding': shares,
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'Ativo': ativo_total,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liq,
    'Patrim. Lq': patrimonio_liq_parent,
    'Receita Ldida (12 meses)': receita_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
    'Lucro Ldido (12 meses)': lucro_liq_12,
    'Receita Ldida (3 meses)': receita_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro Ldido (3 meses)': lucro_3m,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. Ldida': marg_liquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print results nicely
for k,v in results.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")

# Also print formatted percentages where needed
print('\nFormatted percentages:')
print('Marg. Bruta: {:.2%}'.format(marg_bruta))
print('Marg. EBIT: {:.2%}'.format(marg_ebit))
print('Marg. Líquida: {:.2%}'.format(marg_liquida))
print('EBIT / Ativo: {:.2%}'.format(ebit_ativo))
print('ROIC: {:.2%}'.format(roic))
print('ROE: {:.2%}'.format(roe))




"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
